programs.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programs.desc: After shedding their restrictive religious past in Utah, a couple's ready to start fresh in Rincón, Puerto Rico; they're hunting for a fantasy home to serve as their personal paradise where they can unleash the passions they've always kept hidden.

programs.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programs.desc: A couple has quit their jobs, sold their house, and they're ready to leave the rat race for St. Thomas, Virgin Islands; one has champagne taste and is out to splurge, but the other is budget-conscious and wants to put a cork in the spending.

programs.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programs.desc: A couple that owns two wedding venues in Texas are ready to find a Bahamian vacation home on the island of Eleuthera; after years of hosting everyone else's happily-ever-afters, they're taking a timeout to find a home for their own love story.

programs.title: Bachelor Mansion Takeover
programs.desc: Former Bachelors and Bachelorettes come together to upgrade the Bachelor Mansion's most iconic space, the pool! Two teams battle to create the ultimate poolside oasis and wellness retreat. And as tension grows, everyone's pushed to the max.

programs.title: Married to Real Estate
programs.desc: Newlyweds look to start their lives together in a Craftsman style home in Atlanta; when it comes to design, they're total opposites, but the great task for Egypt and Mike is to create a designated space for storing and cooking his quality meats.

programs.title: Married to Real Estate
programs.desc: For over a year, a couple raising a toddler have searched for their dream home; they turn to Egypt and Mike for help; Egypt finds the perfect place and is tasked with adding lots of color throughout the home to create a vibrant design style.
